title: Little Rock Farmers Market Opens Its 52nd Season on May 16

seo.title: Little Rock Farmers Market Returns for 52nd Season | Metro Little Rock News
seo.description: The Little Rock Farmers Market returns May 16 at the River Market pavilions, running every Saturday 7 a.m.–1 p.m. through August 1 for its 52nd season.

summary: The Little Rock Farmers Market kicks off its 52nd season on Saturday, May 16, at the River Market pavilions in downtown Little Rock. The market runs every Saturday from 7 a.m. to 1 p.m. through August 1, offering fresh produce, handmade goods, and local vendors.

body_sections.body: The Little Rock Farmers Market returns later this month for its 52nd consecutive season, opening Saturday, May 16 at the River Market pavilions in downtown Little Rock. Hours are 7 a.m. to 1 p.m. every Saturday through August 1.

body_sections.heading: What to Expect
body_sections.body: Shoppers can expect the usual mix of fresh locally grown produce, handmade goods, and vendors from around the region. The River Market pavilions have hosted the market for years, making it a fixture of downtown's weekend routine through the summer months.

impact_note: For downtown residents and anyone within easy driving distance, this marks the return of one of the more reliable sources for local produce in the metro area during summer.
